metadata.description: Marketplace for the pencil-atelier design-quality toolkit. Bundles authoring, auditing, analysis, and transpile skills for Pencil (.pen) design files, backed by three read-only subagents.

plugins.name: pencil-atelier
plugins.description: Library-agnostic design-quality toolkit for Pencil (.pen) files. Enforces a universal 4px-grid sizing scale, variable-first tokens, component extraction at the second repetition, and persistent design briefs across sessions. Includes safe-apply pipeline (R5) that prevents `replace_all_matching_properties` variable-escape corruption.
